description: Build the core app shell: collapsible sidebar navigation, top header bar with theme toggle, and the authenticated dashboard layout. The sidebar should have Notion-style navigation with sections for Today, Calendar, Tasks, Habits, and Settings. Include user avatar/menu in sidebar footer.
steps: Create components/layout/Sidebar.tsx: collapsible left sidebar (expanded ~240px, collapsed ~64px icon-only). Sections: top logo/brand, navigation items (Today/Home with sun icon, Calendar with calendar icon, Tasks with check-square icon, Habits with target icon), bottom section (Settings with gear icon, user avatar with name/email, collapse toggle). Use lucide-react icons. Notion-style: clean borders, subtle hover states, rounded items.

Create components/layout/Header.tsx: top bar spanning the content area (to the right of sidebar). Contains: page title (dynamic), breadcrumb optional, right side: theme toggle button (sun/moon icon using next-themes useTheme), notification bell icon placeholder, user avatar dropdown.
Create components/layout/ThemeToggle.tsx: a button that cycles between light/dark/system using next-themes. Show sun icon for light, moon for dark, monitor for system.

Create components/layout/AppShell.tsx: the main layout wrapper that composes Sidebar + Header + main content area. Handles sidebar collapsed state. Content area takes remaining width with proper padding.
Create app/dashboard/layout.tsx: uses AppShell to wrap all /dashboard/* child routes. Requires authentication (useSession check, redirect if unauthenticated).
Update app/dashboard/page.tsx: simple 'Today' page placeholder with a greeting (Good morning/afternoon/evening, {name}) and empty state content.
Create app/dashboard/calendar/page.tsx: placeholder page with heading 'Calendar'.
Create app/dashboard/tasks/page.tsx: placeholder page with heading 'Tasks'.
Create app/dashboard/habits/page.tsx: placeholder page with heading 'Habits'.
Create app/dashboard/settings/page.tsx: placeholder page with heading 'Settings'.
Ensure sidebar navigation links use Next.js Link component and highlight the active route using usePathname.
Run pnpm build to confirm all routes and components compile.
acceptance_criteria: Sidebar renders with navigation items: Today, Calendar, Tasks, Habits, Settings
Sidebar is collapsible (state managed via useState or context)
Header shows theme toggle that actually switches between light and dark mode
All /dashboard/* routes render within the AppShell layout
Active navigation item is visually highlighted based on current pathname
User info (name, avatar) appears in sidebar from next-auth session
findings: Build passes cleanly. Used next/image for user avatar to avoid ESLint warning. Added remotePatterns config for Google OAuth avatar domain. Dashboard layout uses useSession with required:true for auth gating. All placeholder pages are server components except dashboard/page.tsx which needs useSession for greeting.
